title: Switch which for that in README.md
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Replace #512 changing out "which" for "that" in the README.md.  Thanks for the heads up @quaid!

comments.body:

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan ece548cf25d8999d6c2beb2057f558840f77503d -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

@rhatdan, you might want to change the repository's description as well:

"A tool **which** facilitates building OCI images"
